title: PM Domain Lifecycle And State Model
objective: Define the lifecycle and state model for PM/work entities, including WorkPackage, Task, ExecutionIssue, ProgressSnapshot, and approval-relevant transitions that must be auditable before SQL design begins.
constrained_outputs: One lifecycle/state model document under c:/APEX Platform/Platform-Authority
Explicit state transitions, approvals, derived statuses, and audit expectations
validation_steps: Separate schedule state from execution state
Separate derived display state from stored lifecycle state
Identify which transitions require audit and approval records
